pages.title: Tortle
pages.text: Shelled. Height 0.85, width 1.3. Slow on land, durable, holds breath underwater for longer than the others.$(br2)The shell is part of you and occupies your chest slot. No other chestplate fits. Defense is roughly equivalent to a diamond chestplate.

pages.title: Turtle Shell
pages.text: Permanent chest-slot armor. Cannot be removed, replaced, or damaged off you.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Shell Guard.$(/) Strikes that land on your back deal 60% less damage.$(br2)$(bold)Claws.$(/) Bare-hand attacks gain +1 damage.$(br2)$(bold)Deep Lungs.$(/) Hold breath underwater for roughly 60 seconds. Not true water-breathing.$(br2)$(bold)Plodding.$(/) Movement speed reduced 25%.
